mlb.headline: Gabriel Moreno hits 2-run homer, Diamondbacks avoid sweep with 5-1 win over Nationals
mlb.summary: — Gabriel Moreno hit a two-run homer, Michael Soroka threw seven effective innings and the Arizona Diamondbacks avoided a series sweep with a 5-1 win over the Washington Nationals on Sunday.

mlb.headline: Brandon Marsh homers for 3rd straight day as Phillies beat White Sox 9-5
mlb.summary: — Brandon Marsh homered for the third straight day and drove in two runs, Rafael Marchán also went deep and the Philadelphia Phillies beat the Chicago White Sox 9-5 on Sunday.

mlb.headline: Torres homers, Walker hits RBI double as Cardinals rally past crumbling Reds 5-3 for series sweep
mlb.summary: — Bryan Torres homered, Jordan Walker hit an RBI double and the St. Louis Cardinals scored on two errors in the eighth inning to rally past the Cincinnati Reds 5-3 on Sunday to sweep the series.

mlb.headline: Jacob deGrom pitches 6 strong innings, Rangers hit 4 homers in 10-0 win over the Guardians
mlb.summary: — Jacob deGrom allowed only three singles over six innings, Justin Foscue hit the first of Texas' four home runs and the Rangers beat Cleveland 10-0 on Sunday, giving them three consecutive series wins for the first time this season.

nhl.headline: Brind'Amour: No decisions yet on Hurricanes' Game 4 lineup
nhl.summary: Hurricanes coach Rod Brind'Amour said he doesn't "anticipate a lot of changes" to his Game 4 lineup after his team fell behind 2-1 in its Stanley Cup Final series against the Golden Knights.

nhl.headline: Connor McDavid ties Wayne Gretzky with 5th Ted Lindsay Award
nhl.summary: Connor McDavid of the Oilers has won the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's most outstanding player as voted by his peers.

nhl.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Golden Knights reclaim favorite status after wild double OT win
nhl.summary: With a 2-1 series lead, the Golden Knights are back as favorites to take home the Stanley Cup.

nba.headline: Spurs confident they can dig out of 2-0 hole in NBA Finals
nba.summary: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs are remaining confident in their chances despite a 2-0 deficit in the NBA Finals with Game 3 set for Monday at Madison Square Garden.

nba.headline: With Trump attending Game 3, watch party canceled, NYPD says
nba.summary: As part of enhanced security measures with President Donald Trump attending Game 3 of the NBA Finals between the Knicks and Spurs on Monday night, there will be no watch party outside Madison Square Garden, the New York Police Department said Sunday.

nba.headline: Stacey King, 3-time NBA champion with Bulls, dies at 59
nba.summary: Stacey King, a three-time NBA champion with the Chicago Bulls who became a fan favorite on their broadcast team after his playing career, has died at 59.

nba.headline: Sources: 76ers promote Jameer Nelson; Elton Brand taking new role
nba.summary: The 76ers are promoting assistant general manager Jameer Nelson to be team's executive vice president of basketball operations under new president Mike Gansey, making the one-time NBA All-Star the No. 2 executive for the franchise, sources told ESPN.

nba.headline: NBA Finals 2026: Inside the Knicks' journey to embracing the bench

wnba.summary: Breanna Stewart told her team to wake up halfway through a dismal shooting performance in Saturday's Commissioner's Cup game, and the Liberty responded with a rugged second-half effort.

wnba.headline: Breanna Stewart has 30 points as the Liberty rally past the Fever 83-75
wnba.summary: — Breanna Stewart made 18 of 21 free throws and scored 30 points to help the New York Liberty rally to beat the Indiana Fever 83-75 on Saturday night.

wnba.summary: — Angel Reese had 18 points and a season-high 17 rebounds and the Atlanta Dream beat Washington 109-77 on Saturday night in a game during which Mystics coach Sydney Johnson was ejected and escorted off the court by police.

wnba.headline: A'ja Wilson's double-double, Jackie Young's 27 points with 6 3s help Aces beat the Valkyries 84-79
wnba.summary: — A’ja Wilson had 28 points and 14 rebounds, Jackie Young hit 6 of 8 from 3-point range and finished with a season-high 27 points, and the Las Vegas Aces beat the Golden State Valkyries 84-79 on Saturday for their first home victory of the season.

ncaab.headline: Rodriguez's 5 RBIs push Texas past Oregon
ncaab.summary: Adrian Rodriguez had two hits and drove in five runs to power the Texas Longhorns to an 11-3 victory over the Oregon Ducks on Saturday at UFCU Disch-Falk Field in the opening game of the NCAA Austin Super Regional.

ncaab.headline: Lebron, Fay lead Alabama to win over St. John's
ncaab.summary: Justin Lebron went 3-for-4 with two RBIs and starter Tyler Fay was dominant, guiding Alabama to an 8-0 victory over St. John's on Saturday at Sewell-Thomas Stadium in the opening game of the NCAA Tuscaloosa Super Regional.

f1.headline: Charles Leclerc left furious after Ferrari brake issue in Monaco GP: 'Look like an idiot'

f1.headline: Monaco GP: Cadillac and Sergio Perez stripped of first F1 points, Aston Martin promoted
f1.summary: Cadillac scored and then lost its first ever Formula 1 point as Sergio Pérez was hit by a post-race penalty at the Monaco Grand Prix, promoting Fernando Alonso into 10th for Aston Martin.

f1.headline: Monaco GP: Pierre Gasly 'robbed' of podium finish, Alpine protests penalty
f1.summary: Alpine has protested the result of the Monaco Grand Prix over the post-race penalty which Pierre Gasly said "robbed" him and the team of a dramatic podium.
